issues.description: ID card, phone and bank account are stored in plaintext without encryption.
issues.impact: Sensitive personal data can be directly leaked once database is exposed.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: id_card = encrypt_field(id_card); phone = encrypt_field(phone); bank_account = mask_value(bank_account)

issues.description: Registration collects family_members which is not necessary for basic account registration.
issues.impact: Collecting excessive personal data increases privacy and compliance risk.

issues.description: No consent field or consent timestamp exists for data collection traceability.
issues.impact: Cannot prove user authorization for collecting and processing sensitive personal data.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: if not consent: return JsonResponse({'error':'consent required'}, status=400); consent_at = timezone.now()
